headline: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Valuation Check After New Technology Leadership And Robotic Shoulder Surgery Milestones
summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) is back in focus after two technology linked milestones: the appointment of a new chief science and technology leader and a high profile robotic assisted shoulder surgery using its ROSA platform in an outpatient setting. See our latest analysis for Zimmer Biomet Holdings. Despite the recent headlines around robotics and leadership changes, momentum in Zimmer Biomet’s shares has been subdued, with a 1-week share price return of 2.2% and a 1-year total shareholder...
